name: Emily Remler
abstract: Emily Remler (September 18, 1957 – May 4, 1990) was an American jazz guitarist, active from the late 1970s until her death in 1990.

about_quotes.speaker: Kristen Korb
about_quotes.evidence: Emily Remler, the great guitar player, came through Billings about four months before she died, so I got to hang with her a little bit.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kristen Korb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
